title: AMDP with dynamic WHERE clause via APPLY_FILTER
description: AMDP with dynamic WHERE clause via APPLY_FILTER. Key topics: APPLY_FILTER applies a WHERE condition dynamically at runtime. The filter is a string passed from ABAP (e.g. "TRAVELID = '00000009'"). APPLY_FILTER can work on a CDS view directly OR on a temp table.

sections.title: Key Learning Points
sections.description:
◆APPLY_FILTER applies a WHERE condition dynamically at runtime
◆The filter is a string passed from ABAP (e.g. "TRAVELID = '00000009'")
◆APPLY_FILTER can work on a CDS view directly OR on a temp table
◆cl_shdb_seltab=>combine_seltabs converts ABAP RANGES to SQL WHERE string
◆The filter string uses HANA SQL syntax (field names in UPPERCASE)

sections.title: CDS Source Code
sections.codeBlock:
CLASS zcl_amdp_dynamic DEFINITION PUBLIC.

  PUBLIC SECTION.
    INTERFACES if_amdp_marker_hdb.

    TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_details,
             TravelId   TYPE /dmo/travel_id,
             AgencyId   TYPE /dmo/agency_id,
             CustomerId TYPE /dmo/customer_id,
             BookingFee TYPE /dmo/booking_fee,
           END OF ty_details,
           tt_details TYPE TABLE OF ty_details.

    " Method with dynamic WHERE clause as STRING parameter
    CLASS-METHODS: get_details
      IMPORTING
        VALUE(im_select_op)      TYPE string
      EXPORTING
        VALUE(ex_travel_details) TYPE tt_details.

ENDCLASS.

CLASS zcl_amdp_dynamic IMPLEMENTATION.

  METHOD get_details
    BY DATABASE PROCEDURE FOR HDB LANGUAGE SQLSCRIPT
    OPTIONS READ-ONLY
    USING zprac_cds_simple.

    /*
     * Step 1: Fetch ALL data from CDS view into internal table
     */
    EX_TRAVEL_DETAILS =
      SELECT TravelId,
             AgencyId,
             CustomerId,
             BookingFee
      FROM  zprac_cds_simple;

    /*
     * Step 2: Apply the dynamic filter at runtime
     *   APPLY_FILTER( <source>, <filter_string> )
     *
     *   Alternative: APPLY_FILTER directly on the CDS view:
     *     ex_travel_details = APPLY_FILTER( zprac_cds_simple, :im_select_op );
     */
    ex_travel_details =
      APPLY_FILTER( :ex_travel_details, :im_select_op );

  ENDMETHOD.

ENDCLASS.

content:
Key Learning Points

◆APPLY_FILTER applies a WHERE condition dynamically at runtime
◆The filter is a string passed from ABAP (e.g. "TRAVELID = '00000009'")
◆APPLY_FILTER can work on a CDS view directly OR on a temp table
◆cl_shdb_seltab=>combine_seltabs converts ABAP RANGES to SQL WHERE string
◆The filter string uses HANA SQL syntax (field names in UPPERCASE)

CDS Source Code

CLASS zcl_amdp_dynamic DEFINITION PUBLIC.

  PUBLIC SECTION.
    INTERFACES if_amdp_marker_hdb.

    TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_details,
             TravelId   TYPE /dmo/travel_id,
             AgencyId   TYPE /dmo/agency_id,
             CustomerId TYPE /dmo/customer_id,
             BookingFee TYPE /dmo/booking_fee,
           END OF ty_details,
           tt_details TYPE TABLE OF ty_details.

    " Method with dynamic WHERE clause as STRING parameter
    CLASS-METHODS: get_details
      IMPORTING
        VALUE(im_select_op)      TYPE string
      EXPORTING
        VALUE(ex_travel_details) TYPE tt_details.

ENDCLASS.

CLASS zcl_amdp_dynamic IMPLEMENTATION.

  METHOD get_details
    BY DATABASE PROCEDURE FOR HDB LANGUAGE SQLSCRIPT
    OPTIONS READ-ONLY
    USING zprac_cds_simple.

    /*
     * Step 1: Fetch ALL data from CDS view into internal table
     */
    EX_TRAVEL_DETAILS =
      SELECT TravelId,
             AgencyId,
             CustomerId,
             BookingFee
      FROM  zprac_cds_simple;

    /*
     * Step 2: Apply the dynamic filter at runtime
     *   APPLY_FILTER( ,  )
     *
     *   Alternative: APPLY_FILTER directly on the CDS view:
     *     ex_travel_details = APPLY_FILTER( zprac_cds_simple, :im_select_op );
     */
    ex_travel_details =
      APPLY_FILTER( :ex_travel_details, :im_select_op );

  ENDMETHOD.

ENDCLASS.
details:
USAGE IN ABAP REPORT:

DATA lv_travel_id TYPE /dmo/travel_id.

SELECT-OPTIONS: s_travel_id FOR lv_travel_id.

" Convert ABAP SELECT-OPTIONS to a WHERE clause string

DATA(lv_where) = cl_shdb_seltab=>combine_seltabs(

it_named_seltabs = VALUE #(

( name = 'TRAVELID' dref = REF #( s_travel_id[] ) ) ) ).

zcl_amdp_dynamic=>get_details(

EXPORTING

im_select_op = lv_where

IMPORTING

ex_travel_details = DATA(lt_travel) ).
